frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bhai isliye aajkal shaadi se pehle sab clear hona chahiye, even prenup type understanding if possible. One-sided laws ka scene aisa ho gaya hai ki aadmi kamao bhi aur baad mein alimony deke victim bhi bano; 498A misuse ke itne cases sunne ko milte hain. Bahut ladkiyan stability ke naam pe seedha financial security hi dekh rahi hoti hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially motivated and frames marriage/divorce protections as tools women use against men. It encodes the 'prenup as protection,' 'one-sided laws/498A misuse,' and 'women after stability = gold digger' manifestations.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
